name: github_read_code
description: Read files and directory contents from a GitHub repository. Returns file content AND the SHA hash needed for github_create_update_file. Start by exploring the repository structure with an empty path to see what directories and files actually exist before accessing specific paths. If a path doesn't exist, use github_search_code to find similar files or try common alternatives.

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA. Examples: 'main', 'develop', 'v1.0.0'. Default is the default branch.

path.description: File or directory path within the repo. Use empty string '' to explore the repository root first and see what directories exist. Then navigate to specific paths based on what you discover. Examples: '' (root directory), 'src/' (if it exists), 'README.md'
